name: Uri-Comfort
description: Uri-Comfort is a natural urinary tract infection (UTI) treatment combining Cran-Max® and probiotics for UTI and yeast infection prevention. This innovative formulation works by reducing E. coli adhesion and inhibiting bacteria growth in the urinary tract.
benefits: Scientifically Proven with clinically proven Cran-Max®
48mg PACs combined with 6 strains of probiotics
100% Natural with no added sodium, sugar, or artificial sweetener
Reduces E. coli adhesion to urinary tract cells

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 250ml room temperature water
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet into 250ml of room temperature water

who_can_consume: Women experiencing UTI symptoms, those with recurrent UTI, individuals with yeast infection concerns, those recovering from antibiotics.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have underlying health conditions.

qa.question: Is drinking cranberry juice the same as taking Uri-Comfort?
qa.answer: Not really. Most cranberry juices don't have enough A-type PACs to prevent bacteria from sticking to the urinary tract. Studies show 48mg of PACs daily with probiotics is needed for effective prevention.

qa.question: How does Uri-Comfort work for yeast infections?
qa.answer: Multi-strains of Lactobacillus re-populates intestines with good bacteria and produces lactic and acetic acids to rebalance pH and restore acidity needed to curb yeast overgrowth.
